hiringOpportunities.name: BETC
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Good for internships and junior creative profiles.
hiringOpportunities.summary: BETC runs a dedicated careers hub for its Paris-based creative network and is a strong target for brand, content, and strategy internships.

hiringOpportunities.name: ROSA PARIS
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Best for direct outreach and spontaneous internship applications.
hiringOpportunities.summary: ROSA PARIS currently surfaces a stable official contact route more clearly than a public careers board, so direct outreach is the safer path.

hiringOpportunities.name: Wellcom
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Directly relevant for PR, influence, and communications internships.
hiringOpportunities.summary: Wellcom currently exposes a stable official contact page, which is the more reliable application route for outreach in PR, branding, and digital influence.

hiringOpportunities.name: Ogilvy Paris
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Good for broad network applications and early-career outreach.
hiringOpportunities.summary: Ogilvy France highlights careers directly on its official France pages, making it a practical target for account, creative, and digital applications.

hiringOpportunities.name: VML France
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Useful for digital marketing, CRM, and social applications.
hiringOpportunities.summary: VML France is part of a larger network, but its careers route is active and worth checking for Paris-based junior and internship-friendly listings.

hiringOpportunities.name: Havas Paris
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Best for direct outreach with a tailored CV and portfolio.
hiringOpportunities.summary: Havas Paris exposes a direct HR contact and jobs reference on its official pages, which is the safer route when specific internship posts are not listed.

hiringOpportunities.name: Three52
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Solid target for digital design and web-oriented internships.
hiringOpportunities.summary: Three52 maintains an active careers page and is one of the clearest digital agency routes in Luxembourg for internship-style outreach.

hiringOpportunities.name: Point A
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Strong option for unsolicited internship applications.
hiringOpportunities.summary: Point A explicitly invites candidates to email their CV through its official contact page, which is a stable route for proactive applications.

hiringOpportunities.name: VOUS Agency
hiringOpportunities.internshipFit: Very relevant when looking for internship placements.
hiringOpportunities.summary: VOUS shows stage-style opportunities and a jobs contact route on its official team page, making it one of the clearest Luxembourg targets.

agencyDirectory.name: Publicis Luxe
agencyDirectory.summary: Luxury-focused creative agency inside the Publicis group with brand, digital, and campaign work.

agencyDirectory.name: Buzzman
agencyDirectory.summary: Independent Paris agency known for campaigns blending brand storytelling and social-first thinking.

agencyDirectory.name: heaven
agencyDirectory.summary: Digital-native agency in Paris with social, activation, influencer, and content work.

agencyDirectory.name: WNP
agencyDirectory.summary: French independent communications agency spanning strategy, creative, and public relations work.

agencyDirectory.name: DDB Paris
agencyDirectory.summary: Large international network agency with Paris-based creative and brand communications work.

agencyDirectory.name: Branderella
agencyDirectory.summary: Luxembourg branding and design agency suited to students interested in identity systems and campaigns.

agencyDirectory.name: lola
agencyDirectory.summary: Well-known Luxembourg creative agency covering campaigns, strategy, and brand communications.

agencyDirectory.name: Knewledge
agencyDirectory.summary: Integrated communication agency with strong digital, content, and media capabilities in Luxembourg.

agencyDirectory.name: binsfeld
agencyDirectory.summary: Long-standing Luxembourg communications agency with strategy, events, branding, and public relations work.

agencyDirectory.name: mi[k]do publicis
agencyDirectory.summary: Publicis-linked Luxembourg agency with capabilities in campaigns, design, and digital communications.

agencyDirectory.name: KS Marketing
agencyDirectory.summary: Marketing-focused Luxembourg firm suited to performance, digital visibility, and content-oriented work.

motivationalQuotes.quote: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
motivationalQuotes.author: Robert Collier

motivationalQuotes.quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
motivationalQuotes.author: Nelson Mandela

motivationalQuotes.quote: Do the best you can until you know better. Then when you know better, do better.
motivationalQuotes.author: Maya Angelou

motivationalQuotes.quote: Courage doesn't always roar. Sometimes courage is the quiet voice at the end of the day saying, I will try again tomorrow.
motivationalQuotes.author: Mary Anne Radmacher

motivationalQuotes.quote: Perseverance is not a long race; it is many short races one after another.
motivationalQuotes.author: Walter Elliot
